extract: Espeon (Japanese: エーフィ Eifie) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up with high friendship during the day or with a Sun Shard in the player's Bag. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Umbreon, Leafeon, Glaceon, and Sylveon. Espeon is one of Wes's first Pokémon in Pokémon Colosseum, alongside Umbreon.
